projectDescription: A full-stack news aggregator that scrapes the top headlines from El País and El Mundo, and provides a React frontend with full CRUD management for custom news items.
keyFeatures: Automated web scraping of top 5 headlines from El País and El Mundo on every feed request
Full CRUD REST API built with Express, TypeScript, and MongoDB
React 18 frontend with real-time debounced search
Domain-Driven Design architecture (application, domain, infrastructure layers)
Dark mode support via Tailwind CSS
Fully containerized with Docker Compose (frontend + backend + MongoDB)
Comprehensive test suite with Jest, SuperTest, and React Testing Library
publicApiSurface: GET /feed — fetch all feeds (triggers scraping + returns stored items)
GET /feed/:id — get a single feed by MongoDB ObjectId
POST /feed — create a new feed item
PUT /feed/:id — update an existing feed by id
DELETE /feed/:id — delete a feed by id
POST /feed/search — search feeds by title substring
useFeedManagement() — React hook exposing getAllFeeds, createFeed, getFeedById, updateFeed, deleteFeed, searchFeedsByTitle
